Concepts

Durable explanations, domain terms, product ideas, and system concepts.

Concept

6 records

ConceptFor everyone

Experience lanes

Chat, Zen, Coffee, Sandbox, and Story are distinct lanes with different emotional weight and control surfaces.

uxfeatureshomepage
ConceptFor users

Free desktop distribution

Official Prism desktop builds are free; optional Patreon support is patronage, not product access.

distributionsupportgetting-started
ConceptFor everyone

LOCAL mode privacy boundary

The LOCAL/ONLINE toggle is a hard privacy boundary: LOCAL turns must not silently leave the user's machine.

privacylocal-firstarchitecturehomepage
ConceptFor developers

Memory and continuity pipeline

Prism stores scoped conversation state, encrypted memory records, and summary/search context while respecting incognito boundaries.

architecturedata-model
ConceptFor developers

Monorepo architecture

Prism is a Node.js, Next.js, Electron, SQLite, Qdrant, and Ollama workspace organized as apps plus shared packages.

architecturedx
ConceptFor everyone

Product promise

Prism is a private-by-default, creative-by-design AI workspace for calm, multi-perspective thinking.

productoverviewhomepage
